profile.name: Your Name
profile.tagline: Video Editor · Audio Engineer · Podcast Producer
profile.bio: I craft compelling audio-visual stories from the heart of Kathmandu. Specialising in video editing, audio engineering, and podcast production — working with hydropower companies, institutions, and independent creators across Nepal.

services.title: Video Editing
services.description: From raw footage to polished final cut. Corporate events, AGMs, documentary, interviews, and creative content for institutions and independent clients.

services.title: Audio Engineering
services.description: Professional recording, mixing, mastering, noise reduction, and sound design. Dialogue cleanup to broadcast-ready masters.

services.title: Podcast Production
services.description: End-to-end podcast production — recording, editing, engineering, and delivery-ready masters. Weekly productions for institutional clients.

video.title: Dr. Anish Ghimire: A Conversation About Environmental Engineering
video.client: FECAM — KU Environmental Engineering & Science Club
video.description: Digo Podcast #1 — In conversation with Dr. Anish Ghimire, Environmental Engineer and Coordinator of the Environmental Engineering program at Kathmandu University.

video.title: Dr. Kumud Raj Kafle: Environmental Studies and Seismic Risks of Nepal
video.client: FECAM — KU Environmental Engineering & Science Club
video.description: Digo Podcast #2 — A conversation with Dr. Kumud Raj Kafle on environmental studies and the seismic risks facing Nepal.

video.title: Dr. Bikash Adhikari: Vice-Chairperson of Nepal Engineering Council
video.client: FECAM — KU Environmental Engineering & Science Club
video.description: Digo Podcast — In conversation with Dr. Bikash Adhikari, Vice-Chairperson of the Nepal Engineering Council (NEC).

video.title: Dr. Dhundi Raj Pathak: President of CREEW
video.client: FECAM — KU Environmental Engineering & Science Club
video.description: Digo Podcast — Conversation with Dr. Dhundi Raj Pathak, President of the Center of Research for Environment, Energy & Water (CREEW).

video.title: KU Robotics Club
video.description: Recording and video production for KU Robotics Club — events, showcases, and club activities. (Upload coming soon)

audio.title: Podcast with Ramesh Maskey Sir
audio.description: Full podcast production — recording, audio engineering, noise reduction, mixing and mastering. Long-form interview with Ramesh Maskey Sir.

audio.title: Barasinghe Production Plant Interview
audio.description: On-location interview recording and audio post-production for the Barasinghe Production Plant feature.

podcast.title: Hospital Podcast Series
podcast.description: Weekly podcast production — 6 episodes per week, 40 minutes each. Full service: recording, audio engineering, editing, and delivery. Ongoing institutional contract.

podcast.title: Interview with Ramesh Maskey Sir
podcast.description: Long-form podcast interview recorded and produced for Kathmandu University Robotics Club. Full production from recording to mastered deliverable.
